prompt: I have a Vue 3 app (Vite + Vue Router) and I just added yauth to my backend. I need a login page, register page, and a dashboard that shows the user's email and role. The auth API is at /api/auth. Also need to handle the MFA challenge flow if the user has MFA enabled.

assertions.text: LoginPage uses LoginForm component with onMfaRequired handler
MfaChallenge component is shown when MFA is required during login
DashboardPage uses useSession or useYAuth to display user info
Vue Router is configured with routes for login, register, and dashboard
